member.name: T:EthereumTransactionData
member.summary:
This class represents the data of an Ethereum transaction.

It may be of subclass {@link EthereumTransactionDataLegacy} or of subclass {@link EthereumTransactionDataEip1559}

member.name: M:EthereumTransactionData.ToBytes
member.summary: Serialize the ethereum transaction data into bytes using RLP
member.returns: the serialized transaction as a byte array

member.name: M:EthereumTransactionData.ToString
member.summary: Serialize the ethereum transaction data into a string
member.returns: the serialized transaction as a string
